title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DSV India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at DSV India
jsonLd.description:
DSV India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DSV India:
DSV India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DSV India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
